root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no, (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no) as memname, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount, sc_mem_m_member_work_info.group_position, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_objective_code, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description --, pkb_repyear.fp_loan_sum_int( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , to_date( '01/01/' || to_char( sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year ) ,'dd/mm/yyyy' ) ,to_date( '31/12/' || to_char( sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year ) ,'dd/mm/yyyy' ) ) as year_total_interest
,pka_lon_intsrv.fp_intrate_table_loantype( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type) as loan_int_rate
,sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year ,sc_acc_m_account_year.beginning_of_account ,sc_acc_m_account_year.ending_of_account
,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name
,sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_registered_no ,sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name ,sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name ,sc_cnt_m_coop.address ,sc_cnt_m_coop.tumbol_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_cnt_m_coop.province_code , sc_cnt_m_coop.district_code ) as coop_district_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name( sc_cnt_m_coop.province_code ) as coop_province_name ,sc_cnt_m_coop.telephone_no --,sc_cnt_m_coop.mooban ,sc_cnt_m_coop.muu ,sc_cnt_m_coop.soi ,sc_cnt_m_coop.road ,sc_cnt_m_coop.postcode
,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,'0' ) as member_address
,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.grt_int_paid
,sc_lon_req_coll_law_head.coll_ref_type ,sc_lon_req_coll_law_head.coll_type
FROM sc_lon_m_contract, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj, sc_mem_m_member_work_info, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_acc_m_account_year ,sc_cnt_m_coop ,sc_mem_m_ucf_doc_place ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll ,sc_lon_req_coll_law_head WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ) and sc_mem_m_ucf_doc_place.item_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.doc_place_status and ( sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.tax_reduce in ( '1' ) )
--and pkb_repyear.fp_loan_sum_int( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , to_date( '01/01/' || to_char( sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year ) ,'dd/mm/yyyy' ) ,to_date( '31/12/' || to_char( sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year ) ,'dd/mm/yyyy' ) ) > 0
and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '04' and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.support_coll = '0' or sc_lon_m_contract_coll.support_coll is null ) and sc_lon_req_coll_law_head.doc_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no /*WHERE*/
